findings.title: CopyButton missing .catch() on clipboard API
findings.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText() promise had no .catch() handler — unhandled rejection if clipboard fails.

findings.title: VideoPlayer redundant borderColor property
findings.issue: Both border shorthand and borderColor set to same value. Redundant.

suppressedFindings.title: Queue link in desktop/mobile nav deviates from spec
suppressedFindings.reason: Intentional user decision (commit 9ed9f4a). Spec not updated but deliberate.

suppressedFindings.title: Studio getting-started simplified from 3 steps to 1
suppressedFindings.reason: Intentional UX simplification. Task marked complete by implementer.

suppressedFindings.title: VideoPlayer isPlaying default may not match autoplay state
suppressedFindings.reason: Below threshold. Muted autoplay works on all modern browsers.
